description_long: This object is a bunch of dark purple to nearly black grapes, each grape appearing plump and round with a glossy, slightly reflective skin. The grapes are tightly clustered together, forming a conical bunch that tapers toward the bottom. A short, greenish-brown stem is visible at the top, connecting the grapes and providing a natural anchor point. The surface of the grapes shows subtle highlights, indicating a smooth and semi-soft texture. The overall bunch is compact, with individual grapes pressed closely together, creating a dense and visually appealing cluster. The coloration is consistent throughout, with minor variations in shading due to natural light reflection and grape positioning.
description: A tightly packed, conical bunch of dark purple-black grapes with a glossy, smooth surface and a visible stem at the top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dense, conical arrangement of grapes with the stem slightly visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and layering of the grape cluster, with the stem more prominently angled.
description_view_2: Angled view revealing the compactness of the bunch and the way grapes overlap, with the stem visible from the side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded back of the bunch and the close packing of grapes, with the stem partially obscured.
attribute_bunch_arrangement: Tightly packed, conical, and compact with grapes closely clustered together.
attribute_clustering_pattern: random clusters with dense, overlapping arrangement
